channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Every day this, CCTV camera URGENT action required, 25th April
item.description:
Every single day of the week someone leave rubbish, like this we had enough!!! Hackney council is required CCTV camera check to find out who is responsible for this and ideally inform the Metropolitan Police about it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree vandalised, 25th April
item.description:
Tree laying on side but still alive

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wendover Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on street, 25th April
item.description:
Fly tipping on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hertford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown branches at bottom of trees blocking pavement, 25th April
item.description:
On at least 2 trees on Page Heath Lane just above the Bird in Hand Lane junction, branches are overgrown and blocking the pavement. The council has recently issued notices to many residents requiring them to cut back their hedges but has ignored the trees on public property.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Page Heath Lane, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning bags left on street corner, 25th April
item.description:
Street cleaning bags left on street corner

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 abandoned lime bikes, 25th April
item.description:
Thrown over the railings at The Point

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maidenstone Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Blandford Court, 25th April
item.description:
Sofa

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Divider area on the double road, 25th April
item.description:
The division area in the middle of Woodford avenue has litter all along. This issue has been present for months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodford Avenue, Gants Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress springs and bag left on pavement near top of road, 25th April
item.description:
Causing an obstruction for pedestrians
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Anglesea Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible abandoned vehicle, 25th April
item.description:
O/s 131 Chestnut Rise. Vehicle is in poor condition (flat tyres, rusty bodywork). www.gov.uk shows taxed until July 2026 but no MOT since September 2016.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chestnut Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Further recycling left out by street bin, 25th April
item.description:
Daily, ongoing poor presentation of waste and recycling by the bin left for Clarence Mansions. It seems like foxes have got to it leaving waste strewn around. Also, dumping of metal household item. This is becoming a daily occurrence!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fortress Road, by Lady Somerset Road, NW5, by Eleanor Palmer School, 25th April
item.description:
The traffic signals change too quickly not allowing enough time for pedestrians to cross. Today my 11 year old daughter was knocked over by a car at these lights as they don't give you enough time to cross safely. Many drivers don't wait for pedestrians to cross. Please extend the timings!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105, Fortess Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overspilling pulic bin, 25th April
item.description:
This bin is next to the mathron route tomorrow Sunday. Will be televised around the world! Also noticed bus stop C Gunner Lane is overflowing! Not a great image for Greenwich!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Common, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip as usual, 25th April
item.description:
There is a black 3 seat sofa dumped by rear gates of grace mews on samos road. it is taking up most of the pathway making passing it difficult. this is a regular occurrence by house in grace mews.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samos Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fridge and a cooker dumped in the alleyway between 265 and 277 Upper Wickham Lane,DA16 3AP . .Fly-tipping happening constantly despite the nearby CCTV Pole., 25th April
item.description:
Rubbish being dumped constantly in the alleyway between 265 and 277 Upper Wickham Lane,DA16 3AP .Fly- tipping is happening constantly despite the nearby CCTV Pole.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Wickham Lane, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped furniture panels left by recycling bins - Breton House ( Abbey St), 25th April
item.description:
A pile of dismantled furniture panels has been discarded by the recycling bins . The materials appear to include wooden boards with fittings still attached, suggesting they have been left as fly-tippin, This is unsightly and could pose a hazard to residents, particularly children, due to sharp edges and exposed fixings. Please arrange prompt removal asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deteriorated flower box entrance of Dewey Lane, 25th April
item.description:
This plant/flower box at the entrance of Dewey Lane, Tulse Hill Estate (next Jubilee Primary School) has been deteriorating for the last 2 and half years. It would be lovely and a huge uplift for the area if it was replaced. Thank you so much.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tulse Hill, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 inch pothole on Perry St, near entrance to nursery, 25th April
item.description:
This pothole has been here for over two months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several holes, 25th April
item.description:
See photo. Pls repair road here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mounthurst Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lack of litter bins in Sherard Road, 25th April
item.description:
Too much litter is thrown on to roads and pavements
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenvale Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
